race.comment: BUON AMICI (3) got a long way back and never featured here a fortnight ago, but his best form is much stronger than what he showed there. Draws much better today and that should see him closer for the speed with Riordan claiming 1.5kg. Can sit closer this time and get the job done. JUST SUBLIME (1) comes back in trip today after closing well over the 1612m here most recently. Faithfull remains in the saddle and the form out of the last start has been superb. Can get the job done. ROYAL GUARDIAN (7) got back to winning ways last start when a $1.60 favourite over this track and trip. She'll need some luck from the draw, but she rates highly on that effort and it wouldn't surprise to see her go on with the job. VAIN UNIVERSE (10) turned in a better effort last start and can feature again. LUMINOUS LADY (4) is better than she showed last start and can improve out in trip.
